title: GTM Server-side provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Google Tag Manager Server-side container integration. The tenant hosts the GTM container; Stackra dispatches to it via HTTPS with HMAC signature.

webhook_url.description: HTTPS endpoint of the tenant's GTM Server container. Must start with https:// (TLS required).

hmac_secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signing. 32 chars minimum. Rotated by the tenant; changes here trigger MarketingConfigurationChangedNotification. Encrypted at rest.

signature_header.description: HTTP header carrying the HMAC signature. Tenant's GTM container reads this to verify authenticity.

timestamp_header.description: HTTP header carrying the signature's timestamp (Unix seconds). Prevents replay attacks.

signature_tolerance_seconds.description: Signature timestamp tolerance window. Requests with a timestamp older than this may be rejected by the container. Default 5 min.

custom_headers.description: Optional additional headers on every dispatch. Useful for tenant-specific auth (Bearer token, Cloudflare Access token). Values encrypted at rest.
